hooks.command: file_path=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | sed -n 's/.*"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); if [ -n "$file_path" ] && echo "$file_path" | grep -q '\.zig$'; then zig fmt "$file_path" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.(env|secret|key|pem|p12)"'; then echo 'BLOCK: Refusing to edit sensitive file'; exit 1; fi
